description: List information about block faces. Output is for deformable blocks only; the keyword rigid , if supplied, will invert output to rigid blocks only.

keywords.name: bad-edge
keywords.description: List block faces that have 3 vertices along a single edge; used in diagnosing problems with zoning.

keywords.name: bad-normal
keywords.description: List block faces that have normals that do not point out from the center of the block (inverted faces).

keywords.name: check
keywords.description: List information from an internal check on the data structures associated with the face sub-contact logic. It is used in diagnosing problems.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: List general face information, including face number, block number, normal vector, area, joint number, and group name. This is the default keyword for the block face list command.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: List the position of face centroids.

keywords.name: vertices
keywords.description: List the vertices that make up the faces in the range.
